community_notes.excerpt: r/IntoTheBreach search results include Alpha Blobber and Blobber daily discussions, corroborating that Alpha Blobbers spawn Alpha Blobs and that baiting placement is a known tactic.
Steam discussion search found Blobber threads noting that Blobbers add extra moving parts by spawning blobs, and players discuss positioning/removing the Blobber to control spawned-unit disruption.
